headline: Jim Cramer on Salesforce: “It’s Tough Because the Market Hates Software”
summary: Salesforce, Inc. (NYSE:CRM) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer shared his thoughts on as he discussed Big Tech’s AI spending. When a caller asked about the stock during the episode, Cramer said: Okay, CRM’s very tough. It’s one of my smallest positions. It’s tough because the market hates software, whether it be Palantir, whether […]

headline: KeyBanc Reiterates Service Now’s (NOW) Underweight Rating
summary: ServiceNow Inc. (NYSE:NOW) is one of the Best American AI Stocks to Buy Now. headline: Bernstein Raises its Price Target on ServiceNow (NOW) to $236
